zh.lifeSummary: 當Ida FitzWalter於大約1292年出生時，她的父親Sir Robert FitzWalter 1st Lord FitzWalter46歲，母親Alianore De Ferriers21歲。她於1305年與Lord Robert de la Warde of Burton Overy在英國英格蘭艾可亨哈姆結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1361年11月7日享年70歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ida FitzWalter于大约1292年出生时，她的父亲Sir Robert FitzWalter 1st Lord FitzWalter46岁，母亲Alianore De Ferriers21岁。她于1305年与Lord Robert de la Warde of Burton Overy在英国英格兰艾可亨哈姆结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于1361年11月7日享年70岁。

nameMeanings.name: FitzWalter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English, Irish: relationship name from Anglo-Norman French fiz ‘son’ ( see Fitz ) + the personal name Walter , ‘son of Walter’.

variants.name: Fitzwater
meanings: Irish: altered form of Fitzwalter, a patronymic from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (see Fitz ) + the personal name Walter , meaning ‘son of Walter’.

History: This is the name of a family of Norman origin, descended from Godfrey, Count of Brionne (died c. 1010). Godfrey's grandson, Richard FitzGilbert, accompanied William the Conqueror and was made Lord of Clare. His great-grandson was Robert FitzWalter, one of the barons who guaranteed the Magna Carta in 1215.

variants.name: Walter
meanings: English (of Norman origin), German, Dutch, Polish, Swedish, and Danish: from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This personal name was introduced into England both in the reign of Edward the Confessor and by the Normans (in the forms Walt(i)er, Waut(i)er). After the Norman Conquest it soon became one of the most popular personal names in Britain. Compare Walther .
Germanized or Americanized form of Czech, Slovak, Croatian, and Slovenian Valter and Czech Valtr: from the personal name Valter, Valtr, of ancient Germanic origin (see 1 above).

variants.name: Fitz
meanings: English: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (from Latin filius), used originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same personal name and then conventionalized as a hereditary surname, or short for a surname of which fiz ‘son’ was the first element, for example Fitzhenry and Fitzroy .
German: from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Vinzenz (see Vincent ) or Vitus (see Vito , compare Veit ). Compare also Fietz .

nameMeanings.name: Ida
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Norman name, of Germanic origin, derived from īd ‘work’. This died out during the later Middle Ages. It was revived in the 19th century, influenced by its use in Tennyson's The Princess ( 1847 ) for the central character, who devotes herself to the cause of women's rights and women's education in a thoroughly Victorian way. The name is also associated with Mount Ida in Crete, which was connected in classical times with the worship of Zeus, king of the gods, who was supposed to have been brought up in a cave on the mountainside. In the 1930s it became famous as the name of the film star Ida Lupino ( 1914–1995 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Ida FitzWalter was born about 1292, her father, Sir Robert FitzWalter 1st Lord FitzWalter, was 46 and her mother, Alianore De Ferriers, was 21. She married Lord Robert de la Warde of Burton Overy in 1305, in Henham, Essex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died on 7 November 1361, at the age of 70.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ida FitzWalter est née environ 1292, son père, Sir Robert FitzWalter 1st Lord FitzWalter, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Alianore De Ferriers, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Lord Robert de la Warde of Burton Overy en 1305, à Henham, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 7 novembre 1361, à l’âge de 70 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ida FitzWalter um 1292 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Robert FitzWalter 1st Lord FitzWalter 46 und ihre Mutter Alianore De Ferriers 21. Sie hat 1305 in Henham, Essex, England, United Kingdom Lord Robert de la Warde of Burton Overy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 7. November 1361 im Alter von 70 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ida FitzWalter è nata il circa 1292, sua padre, Sir Robert FitzWalter 1st Lord FitzWalter, aveva 46 anni e sua madre, Alianore De Ferriers, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Lord Robert de la Warde of Burton Overy nel 1305, nel Henham, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 7 novembre 1361, all'età di 70 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Ida FitzWalterが約1292年に生まれた時，父Sir Robert FitzWalter 1st Lord FitzWalterは46歳，母Alianore De Ferriersは21歳であった。1305年にイギリスイギリスエセックスヘンハムでLord Robert de la Warde of Burton Overyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1361年11月7日に70歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ida FitzWalter(이)가 대략 1292년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Robert FitzWalter 1st Lord FitzWalter(은)는 46세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alianore De Ferriers(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1305년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 헨함에서 Lord Robert de la Warde of Burton Overy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1361년 11월 7일 70세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ida FitzWalter nasceu aproximadamente 1292, seu pai, Sir Robert FitzWalter 1st Lord FitzWalter, tinha 46 anos e sua mãe, Alianore De Ferriers, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Lord Robert de la Warde of Burton Overy em 1305, em Henham, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 7 de novembro de 1361, com 70 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ida FitzWalter родилась около 1292 г., её отцу по имени Sir Robert FitzWalter 1st Lord FitzWalter было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Alianore De Ferriers, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Lord Robert de la Warde of Burton Overy в 1305 г. в местности хенам, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла 7 ноября 1361 г. в возрасте 70 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ida FitzWalter nació aproximadamente 1292, su papá, Sir Robert FitzWalter 1st Lord FitzWalter, tenía 46 años y su mamá, Alianore De Ferriers, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Lord Robert de la Warde of Burton Overy en 1305, en Henham, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió el 7 de noviembre de 1361, a la edad de 70 años.
